title: Check if There is a Valid Path in a Grid
titleCn: 检查网格中是否存在有效路径

testcases.input: grid = [[2,4,3],[6,5,2]] Output: true Explanation: As shown you can start at cell (0, 0) and visit all the cells of the grid to reach (m - 1, n - 1).
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: As shown you can start at cell (0, 0) and visit all the cells of the grid to reach (m - 1, n - 1).

testcases.input: grid = [[1,2,1],[1,2,1]] Output: false Explanation: As shown you the street at cell (0, 0) is not connected with any street of any other cell and you will get stuck at cell (0, 0)
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: As shown you the street at cell (0, 0) is not connected with any street of any other cell and you will get stuck at cell (0, 0)

testcases.input: grid = [[1,1,2]] Output: false Explanation: You will get stuck at cell (0, 1) and you cannot reach cell (0, 2).
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: You will get stuck at cell (0, 1) and you cannot reach cell (0, 2).
